truthAudit.Summary: Run 2 correctly identified 7 of 20 ground-truth vulnerabilities with accurate line-level evidence. It missed 13 vulnerabilities and failed to identify the specific config-validation command injection (SC-V3-004), though it reported a related but distinct admin-exec command injection. No evidence laundering detected; all 'found' claims are directly supported by Run 2's original text.

Items.Notes: Run 2 explicitly identified this vulnerability with correct location (log_debug_message) and evidence (printf(active_format.c_str(), user_input)).
Run 2 did not analyze the fact() lambda in FunctionRegistry or the integer overflow behavior.
Run 2 did not analyze stage_deferred_history_flush or the use-after-free risk during memory pool cleanup.
Run 2 identified a different command injection (admin exec) but missed the config validation system() call specified in SC-V3-004.

Items.PreviousOutputQuote: Stack Buffer Overflow via strcpy in evaluate_expression
Items.Notes: Run 2 correctly identified the stack overflow condition and quoted the exact buggy branch.
Run 2 correctly identified the race condition and quoted the exact locking flaw.
Run 2 did not analyze the EMERGENCY_OVERRIDE logic bomb in authenticate().
Run 2 did not analyze path traversal in load_config().
Run 2 correctly identified the heap overflow and quoted the exact strcpy usage.
Run 2 correctly identified the hardcoded credential and quoted the exact constant.
Run 2 correctly identified the weak PRNG issue and quoted the distribution range, though it cited CWE-330 instead of CWE-338.
Run 2 did not analyze the localtime/cached_time thread-unsafe usage in log_debug_message.
Run 2 did not analyze insecure temp file handling in append_override_audit_event().
Run 2 did not analyze persistent authentication state risks across sessions.
Run 2 did not analyze unhandled std::stod exception in handle_variable_command().
Run 2 did not analyze integer underflow in memory pool block split logic.
Run 2 did not analyze unbounded recursion in the parser functions.
Run 2 did not analyze data race in result_cache_ access without mutex.
Run 2 did not analyze TOCTOU race between filesystem::exists and sleep_for/open.
Run 2 correctly identified the division by zero condition and quoted the exact calculation.
